message:
fix(node): correctness fixes across CRDT, lease, ZK attestation, revocation, and cancellation

Fix LWW-Map equal-timestamp non-determinism in crdt.rs by using lexicographic
comparison on serialized values instead of insertion-order-dependent >= check,
ensuring commutativity. Fix off-by-one in lease_service.rs expiration check
(now >= instead of > for fail-closed zero-remaining semantics). Add future-proof
rejection in zk_attestation.rs for attestations with generated_at_ms ahead of
current time. Add future-epoch rejection in revocation_freshness_gate.rs for
proofs claiming epochs ahead of current_epoch. Propagate leak errors from
force_finalize_internal into drain timeout error strings in
cancellation_protocol.rs. Clear incident history after rollback in
crash_loop_detector.rs to prevent stale incidents from influencing future
decisions. Remove dead unreachable slash check in staking_governance.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
